Server-side plugin/SDF loads and publishes correctly; GUI client crashes. World-only test, no vehicle spawn. Root cause: strong but unconfirmed hypothesis -- unlike every working world, usbl_tutorial.world has zero <gui> block and is missing the Physics/SceneBroadcaster/UserCommands/Sensors system plugins, so it falls through to Gazebo's stock default GUI config, most likely re-triggering the already-known OGRE2-unavailable-on-this-hardware issue with nothing to catch it. See notes/usbl-gui-crash-investigation.md for full analysis + two proposed diagnostic tests. Needs an actual crash log from a real run to confirm.
